summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Tactical Periodization Academy platform. Backend APIs working correctly with 84.2% success rate. Frontend fully functional with all user flows tested successfully. Authentication, modules, lessons, exercises, AI chat, and admin panel all working as expected.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 401 when no authentication provided
minor_issues.impact: Very low - endpoint works but doesn't enforce auth as expected in test

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 when no authentication provided
minor_issues.impact: Very low - endpoints are properly protected, just different status code

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and modules preview
Student registration creates new accounts successfully
Dashboard shows 7 modules grid with correct data
Lesson pages show markdown content and completion functionality
Exercises page displays 5 exercises with category filters
AI Chat page accessible with message input form
Admin panel shows stats (1 student, 7 modules, 18 lessons, 5 exercises)
Role-based access control working (students cannot access admin panel)
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Logout functionality works for both admin and student
All lesson and module content properly seeded in Italian
Progress tracking and lesson completion working
Complete user journey from landing to lesson completion works
